productDisplayName: Nike Men Ballista White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Sleek and yet aggressively designed, the nike Ballista is replete with comfort and style. Ergonomically designed and well cushioned, it's a great shoe for runs and casual occasions. Product Details Meshed upper for ample breathability Perforated synthetic overlays for structure, midfoot support and ventilation Asymmetrical lacing system for snug Fit and protection from chaffing Twill lace running through mid and back foot overlays for enhanced durability Plush padded tongue for enhanced comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Reinforced overlays on heel cup and above toe guard for enhanced durability and protection EVA midsole for durability and enhanced shock absorption High quality rubber outsole for enhanced durability Forefoot and backfoot outsole with rectangular lugs and grooves for maximum traction and grip Impact guidance system along the length of the foot for ample impact protection, energy return and propulsion Deep flex groove on mid forefoot for flexible movement Arched midfoot to support the inner arch Forefoot outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe box for enhanced protection to the forefoot Material and Care Mesh Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
